atRisk.message: Just one deposit before {{date}} go keep your streak alive. No rush, any goal or circle deposit dey count.

hero.captionEmpty: Do deposit this {{period}} make you light your flame

share.title: Share your streak
share.description: Your card go show only your streak count. Money amount go stay private unless you turn am on.
share.includeAmount: Add the amount wey you save

card.oneDepositPer: One deposit every {{period}} go keep your flame dey burn.
card.changeOncePerYear: You fit change the frequency once for one year.
card.changeOncePerYearNext: You fit change the frequency once for one year. Next change go open for {{year}}.

badges.title: Badge collection
badges.progressNone: Keep your streak alive for three months make you earn your next badge.
badges.progressToday: Your next badge dey land today, make you continue.
badges.progressDays_one: {{count}} day remain to your next badge.
badges.progressDays_other: {{count}} days remain to your next badge.
badges.empty: Keep your streak alive for three months make you earn your first badge. Four dey to collect every year, one for each season.

freezes.title: Streak freezes
freezes.description: Freeze go automatically protect your streak if you miss just one period. You dey earn one every three months (up to four for one year), and na only one you fit use for each quarter.

reminders.title: Small reminders
reminders.description: Just one nudge before a {{period}} go close, only if you want am. Na off by default.

vacation.title: Vacation mode
vacation.description: Life dey happen. Pause your streak once for one year (up to 30 days) without losing your progress.
vacation.usedThisYear: Vacation wey you use this year

footer.disclaimer: Your streak no dey ever touch your balance or your money.

milestone.title: You don earn new badge
milestone.description: Three months of steady saving. That consistency na the whole game. Well done.

profile.title: Streak frequency
profile.description: Choose how often deposit need to happen make e keep your savings streak alive.
profile.frequencyError: We no fit change your streak frequency.
profile.lockNote: You fit change your streak frequency once for one calendar year.
profile.lockNoteNext: You fit change your streak frequency once for one calendar year. Your next change go open for {{year}}.

daily.label: Everyday
daily.description: Keep the flame alive with deposit every day. E good pass for everyday saving habit.

weekly.label: Every week
weekly.description: One deposit any time for the week go keep your streak dey go. Calm, steady pace.

monthly.label: Every month
monthly.description: Just one deposit each calendar month na all wey e need. Gentle and no pressure.
